description.value: Keyword: [Hindered] Effect: Applied when you regain consciousness at 0 HP or below. Can only take one action per turn. Cannot take reactions. Gain the Clumsy and Dazzled Conditions. Recovery: Condition ends when healed above 1 HP through magical healing OR a successful [[/check skill=medicine]] (rank 3 required, 2 successes) by an ally. Self-treatment cannot remove this condition. See Medicine Applications.
